moments.title: Wimbledon Finals Week
moments.blurb: The Wimbledon Championships are in full swing this week, with quarter-finals taking place today and tomorrow, leading up to the Gentlemen's and Ladies' Singles Finals on the weekend of July 11-12.

angles.name: Quarter-finals buzz
angles.copy: Who's making it through to the semi-finals at Wimbledon? The action is heating up on Centre Court and beyond this week!

angles.name: Brits Watch
angles.copy: Are any British hopefuls still in the running for a spot in the Wimbledon finals? We're on the edge of our seats this week!

angles.name: Weekend anticipation
angles.copy: The big one is almost here! Who do you predict will be lifting the trophies at Wimbledon this weekend?

moments.title: Tour de France Continues
moments.blurb: The 113th edition of the Tour de France, which started on July 4 in Barcelona, is currently underway, with cyclists battling through various stages until July 26.

angles.name: Daily Stage Update
angles.copy: Another day, another gruelling stage at the Tour de France! Who impressed you most on the road today?

angles.name: Yellow Jersey Battle
angles.copy: The fight for the Yellow Jersey is getting intense! Who's your pick to win the Tour de France this year?

moments.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 Group Stages
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 is currently in its group stages, having kicked off on June 11 and running until July 19.

angles.name: Today's Matches
angles.copy: World Cup action continues today! Which teams are you backing to get those crucial points in the group stages?

angles.name: Surprise Teams
angles.copy: Any shock results or standout performances caught your eye so far in the World Cup group stages? Tell us!

moments.title: The Open Championship Approaches
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship will be held from July 16-19, 2026, at Royal Birkdale Golf Club in Southport, England, with practice days starting July 12.

angles.name: Countdown to The Open
angles.copy: Golf's biggest major is just a week away! Who are your favourites to lift the Claret Jug at Royal Birkdale?

angles.name: Royal Birkdale hype
angles.copy: Royal Birkdale is ready to host The Open for the 11th time next week. What's your favourite memory from this iconic course?

moments.title: Happy 56th to Beck
moments.blurb: American singer-songwriter and record producer Beck, known for his experimental and eclectic style, turns 56 on July 8.

angles.name: Beck's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 56th Birthday to the one and only Beck! What's your all-time favourite track from the 'Loser' hitmaker?

angles.name: Genre Bender
angles.copy: From folk to funk, hip-hop to rock, Beck has done it all. What's the most surprising Beck song you love?

moments.title: Jack White turns 51
moments.blurb: Jack White, the iconic frontman of The White Stripes and a prolific solo artist, celebrates his 51st birthday on July 9.

angles.name: White Stripes Icon
angles.copy: Happy 51st Birthday to rock legend Jack White! What's your favourite White Stripes anthem or solo hit?

angles.name: Guitar Hero
angles.copy: Jack White is 51! The master of the riff and king of garage rock. What's his most electrifying guitar moment for you?

moments.title: Courtney Love's 62nd Birthday
moments.blurb: Courtney Love, the influential frontwoman of Hole and a grunge icon, celebrates her 62nd birthday on July 9.

angles.name: Grunge Queen
angles.copy: Sending birthday wishes to the legendary Courtney Love, who turns 62 today! What's your favourite Hole track?

angles.name: Iconic Figure
angles.copy: Courtney Love is 62! An undeniable force in rock music and culture. What's her most iconic moment for you?

moments.title: Pet Shop Boys' Neil Tennant is 72
moments.blurb: Neil Tennant, the lead vocalist and co-founder of the iconic synth-pop duo Pet Shop Boys, celebrates his 72nd birthday on July 10.

angles.name: Synth-pop icon
angles.copy: Happy 72nd Birthday to Neil Tennant of Pet Shop Boys! What's the ultimate PSB track that always gets you moving?

angles.name: Timeless Tracks
angles.copy: Neil Tennant is 72! So many incredible hits over the decades. Which Pet Shop Boys song is your all-time favourite?

moments.title: Lil' Kim turns 51
moments.blurb: The legendary rapper and fashion icon Lil' Kim celebrates her 51st birthday on July 11.

angles.name: Queen Bee's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 51st Birthday to the one and only Lil' Kim! What's your favourite track from the Queen Bee?

angles.name: Hip-Hop Icon
angles.copy: Lil' Kim is 51 today! A true pioneer and style icon in hip-hop. What's her most unforgettable moment for you?

moments.title: Richie Sambora is 67
moments.blurb: Richie Sambora, the former lead guitarist and co-songwriter for rock giants Bon Jovi, celebrates his 67th birthday on July 11.

angles.name: Bon Jovi Guitar Hero
angles.copy: Happy 67th Birthday to Richie Sambora! What's your favourite Bon Jovi classic that features his legendary guitar work?

angles.name: Solo or Band?
angles.copy: Richie Sambora turns 67! Do you prefer his work with Bon Jovi or his solo material? Let us know!

moments.title: Boney M's Liz Mitchell turns 74
moments.blurb: Liz Mitchell, the lead singer of the hugely successful disco and Euro-pop group Boney M., celebrates her 74th birthday on July 12.

angles.name: Disco Queen's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 74th Birthday to Liz Mitchell, the iconic voice of Boney M.! Which of their hits makes you want to dance?

angles.name: Timeless Disco
angles.copy: Liz Mitchell is 74 today! So many classic tracks that still fill dancefloors. What's your favourite Boney M. song?

moments.title: Leon Bridges turns 37
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning soul and R&B singer-songwriter Leon Bridges celebrates his 37th birthday on July 13.

angles.name: Soulful Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 37th Birthday to the incredibly talented Leon Bridges! What's your go-to track from his soulful discography?

angles.name: Modern Soul
angles.copy: Leon Bridges is 37! His music evokes a classic sound with a modern twist. What's your favourite Leon Bridges album?

moments.title: Imagine Dragons' Dan Reynolds is 39
moments.blurb: Dan Reynolds, the lead singer of the multi-platinum rock band Imagine Dragons, celebrates his 39th birthday on July 14.

angles.name: Imagine Dragons Frontman
angles.copy: Happy 39th Birthday to Dan Reynolds of Imagine Dragons! Which of their anthems gets you pumped every time?

angles.name: Powerful Vocals
angles.copy: Dan Reynolds turns 39 today! His voice is unmistakable. What's your favourite Imagine Dragons song to sing along to?

moments.title: Black Eyed Peas' Taboo turns 51
moments.blurb: Taboo, a member of the Grammy-winning hip-hop group Black Eyed Peas, celebrates his 51st birthday on July 14.

angles.name: Party Starter's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 51st Birthday to Taboo of Black Eyed Peas! What's the ultimate B.E.P. track to get any party started?

angles.name: Global Hits
angles.copy: Taboo is 51 today! From 'Where Is The Love?' to 'I Gotta Feeling', so many global hits. Which one is your favourite?

moments.title: Summer Holidays Are Coming
moments.blurb: The school summer holidays in the UK are fast approaching, with many schools breaking up in the final week of July.

angles.name: Holiday Countdown
angles.copy: The school summer holidays are almost here! What are your plans for the long break? Let us know!

angles.name: Family Fun
angles.copy: Getting ready for the summer holidays! What's your favourite family activity to do when the kids are off school?
